description: Run Outbound agent for EN account (@meruru_tcbn) for 2026-03-13. Goal: plan and execute likes only (0 API replies, 0 follows per operator policy). Identify 1-3 best reply opportunities and output them as manual_replies in the outbound plan. Steps: 1) Read data/strategy_20260313.json for EN outbound_strategy targets. 2) Read config/outbound_rules.json for safety rules. 3) Run python3 scripts/outbound_history.py --account EN --days 7 for history. 4) Run python3 scripts/publisher_outbound_data.py --account EN for target tweet data. 5) Reason about which tweets to like and which are best reply targets. 6) Write data/outbound_plan_20260313_EN.json with manual_replies array. 7) Execute likes via: python3 scripts/publisher.py smart-outbound --account EN --plan data/outbound_plan_20260313_EN.json. 8) Send Marc the manual_replies list formatted for operator.
notes: Replies are manual-only permanently (operator decision 2026-03-13). daily_replies=0, daily_follows=0. Only plan likes. The key deliverable is a formatted list of 1-3 reply recommendations with exact tweet URLs and reply text for the operator to post manually from the app.
